display_text: Band of Elvenskin, Cost: 450: Basic agility component providing +6 Agility. Essential early purchase for heroes scaling with agility for attack speed, armor, and physical damage. Commonly built into Wraith Band for core heroes or other mid-game items. Stats: Agility: +6.
